{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323041932B5076A299E3653812E8A"}"},"total":658},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7447044204131795774","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我看到的国外寻宝的最好的一本小说，主角每次都有大收获，不像别的小说抠抠搜搜的，大气，爽！希望作者大大一直保持下去，多多更新啊！！！[求爆更][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733906838,"group_id":"7440747611193084990","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+ern7QLPOM2XnEn2Ng0Tts=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"105541645610","user_name":"就喜欢系统金手指"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"105541645610","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7440747611193084990","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越+金手指+寻宝+鉴宝=寻宝爽文
杀手王修缘穿越重生在持枪抢劫现场，随后眼睛发生异变的他眼中的世界变得不一样了，各种古董、名画、珠宝、黄金都源源不断的被他获得，他也开始不断地在世界各地寻找着各种宝藏，巴勃罗遗产、文物贩子卢芹斋家族的收藏、纳粹宝藏、山下奉文黄金宝藏、十大海盗王宝藏，一个个谜题开始被揭开，历史也不再神秘。
简介再详细不如正文精彩万分。各位读者老爷们来看看吧，不好看你们随便骂，保证打不还手骂不还口，扑街作者中态度端正第一人。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/13ba16eed9f6bf7f0f0a75fb44eb6737","author":"关山难越的失路人","author_id":"","book_id":"7440747611193084990","book_name":"寻宝王：洗劫欧美各国宝藏","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":17,"name":"鉴宝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=17&name=鉴宝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7440747647469617726","read_count":"27969","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1351801"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"644","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,鉴宝,重生,空间,直播","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/da0e7aad7de37a3785e53c1fa11d80a7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779394772&x-signature=om%2Bk76A9AINODLqeaeXZ55%2FkWfo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"7025744949643","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"129"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323041932B5076A299E3653812E8A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_co unt":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":57397,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":81884,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":6645},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1738820831,"author_reply_time":1738820917,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7578813031591445273","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书写的真好啊给你个大赞你就得多写点寻宝的我写点修仙的，穿到70年代的寻宝啦整点大金砖等高考以后了，做点大买卖了，完了上别的国家整点零元够了，到点大型金库了，整点隐身药了，大力丸了👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟正好是修仙给凡间修仙，修到渡劫就行越写的越精彩，就得血写的稍微有点离谱点，正好像这个我才刚听这个小说就相当不错了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764583321,"group_id":"7440747611193084990","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2SJv1XoXWp/vYcvXZ0kWrFWeJaCfKm7+U1gVb2dZbGb","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787248&x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"3624429416363483","user_name":"中村的本大少"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3624429416363483","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7440747611193084990","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越+金手指+寻宝+鉴宝=寻宝爽文
